case_title: BEVERLY YIP VS. HENRY VAN HO ET AL

MOTION AT JAN-08-2018, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 220 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: CECILIA CASTELLANOS; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY (D220).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YIP, BEVERLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HO, HENRY VAN AN INDIVIDUAL $47,828.00 PRINCIPAL, $21,803.25 ATTORNEY FEES, $6,514.84 INTEREST, $1,730.82 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $77,876.91, SEE SCANNED DOC

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-18-2017 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON SEP-25-2017 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. JENNIFER YOUNG, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. EDWARD ALAN HOLTZ, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT HENRY VAN HO. CASE DID NOT SETTLE WITH JUDGE PRO TEM. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO 9/25/17 DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WHO IS ENGAGED IN TRIAL AT SAN JOAQUIN COUNTY. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
TRIAL COMMENCED.

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON SEP-25-2017 IN DEPT. 608 - THE COURT FINDS FOR THE PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $47,828.00. AS TO THE ALTER EGO ARGUMENT, THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE IS A UNITY OF INTEREST FROM HENRY HO, AND IS USING QUA SPA, LLC AS A SHIELD TO PROTECT HIMSELF AND TRANSFER EXISTING LIABILITY TO QUA SPA, LLC. AS TO COST, THE COURT RULES THAT PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO ATTORNEY FEE'S AND COST. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: CECILIA CASTELLANOS; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY (D608).

THE COURT WILL AWARD: INTEREST IN THE AMOUNT OF $6,514.84; COUNSEL STIPULATES TO ALL ATTORNEY'S FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $15,225.00, LESS $1,522.50; THE COURT WILL DEDUCT PARALEGAL FEES; FILING FEES OF $1,400.55; PREVIOUS ATTORNEY'S FEES $8,697.50 AND COUNSEL TO SPLIT DOCUMENT FILING FEES. COUNSEL TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT AND SERVE OPPOSING COUNSEL. THIS MORNING'S PROCEEDING NOT REPORTED; JUDGE: CECILIA CASTELLANOS; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY (D220).
